name: Visual Design Planner
description: Produces the visual design specification: colour palette, typography, layout system, responsive breakpoints. Includes a coached RETRY for missing design tokens.

checks.pass: ✅ Tailwind config found — will extend existing design tokens
checks.fail: ⚠️  No Tailwind config — design tokens will be defined from scratch
❌ No src/styles directory — CSS architecture is missing

checks.prompt: Create a visual design specification: (1) colour palette (primary, secondary, accent, semantic), (2) typography scale (5 sizes with use cases), (3) spacing system (8px base), (4) responsive breakpoints (sm/md/lg/xl), (5) component border-radius convention. Context: {retryContext}
